execution_boundary.summary: Validation can gate model output while external tool consequence requires a separate execution boundary.

preparation_boundary.summary: Validation and correction may occur before a consequence-bearing call is committed.

commitment_boundary.summary: Validator results can inform commitment review without becoming authority.

semantic_equivalence_boundary.summary: Rephrased unsafe or invalid outputs require consequence-aware validation.

unknown_trajectory_boundary.summary: Unknown validator outcomes or unhandled schemas require bounded failure posture.

authority_boundary.summary: Passing validation is not execution authority.

evidence_freshness_boundary.summary: Validator configuration, model, and policy version matter at commit time.

reconstruction_boundary.summary: Input, output, validator configuration, result, and version references support reconstruction.

interoperability_path.summary: Guardrails results can enter a Commitment Candidate as validation evidence.

next_required_action: add pass, fail, correction, unknown-validator, and tool-boundary fixtures
